description: An applicant who applied for life insurance two weeks ago is calling to check the status.

nodes.task_description: Identify the applicant using their personal information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully locates the pending application.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the current status from the underwriting system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the application status is 'Pending review of paramedical exam results'.

nodes.task_description: Inform the applicant of the status and provide an estimated timeline for the next steps.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the status and that a decision is expected within 5-7 business days.
